title: Listing package twice in command list results in broken link in node crash
body:
Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)
```bash
$ cat pkg.sv
package pkg;
endpackage
$ cat top.sv
module top import pkg::*; #(
) (
);
endmodule
$ cat a.f
pkg.sv
$ cat b.f
pkg.sv
top.sv
```
When calling
`verilator --lint-only -f a.f -f b.f --debug --gdbbt`

I get
```
No stack.
[Thread debugging using libthread_db enabled]
Using host libthread_db library "/lib64/libthread_db.so.1".

-node: PACKAGEIMPORT 0xdf5830 <e12> {f1aw}  * -> PACKAGE 0xdfec40 <e15> {e1aj}  pkg  L3 [LIB] [NONE]
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?
`Verilator 4.216 2021-12-05 rev v4.216`

What OS and distribution are you using?
```
NAME="openSUSE Tumbleweed"
# VERSION="20211124"
```

Would you be willing to try to fix Verilator yourself with assistance?
Yes
